workflow_name: Neptune Controls - Director's Communication Command Center

nodes.label: Message Triage Agent
nodes.description: Fetches recent emails from Gmail and Outlook, plus WhatsApp messages and group chats. Categorizes all messages (Urgent, Team Updates, External, FYI, WhatsApp Groups), flags priority items requiring Director action.

nodes.label: Response Drafter Agent
nodes.description: Analyzes a selected email or WhatsApp message's context and generates a professional draft response. Can send replies via Gmail, Outlook, or WhatsApp (including group messages).
nodes.trigger: Draft Response button on Message Detail

nodes.label: Follow-up Scheduler Agent
nodes.description: Creates a follow-up reminder as a Google Calendar event for a selected email, with appropriate timing and context notes.
nodes.trigger: Schedule Follow-up button on Message Detail

nodes.label: Team Action Tracker Agent
nodes.description: Conversational agent that helps the Director log new action items for team members, update statuses, query pending tasks, and summarize team accountability through natural language using Notion.
nodes.trigger: Chat input on Team Actions tab
